Celebrating 2 Decades in the Industry!

Why Gladiator Safety Shoes

We recognise that wearing safety shoes is an essential element of your workday and not just a requirement. As a result, we place a high value on innovation and ongoing improvement in every pair of shoes we produce.

Our Products:
  • Leather Boots
  • Tactical Boots
  • Metal-Free Safety Shoes
  • Composite Shoes
  • Uniform Shoes
About Us

UNBREAKABLE

COMFORTABLE

TOUGH & DURABLE

Premium Safety Shoes

Unbelievable. Safe. Comfort

The Ultimate Footwear Solution

Gladiator Shoes is aware of the importance that comfort, safety & style are to high performance footwear. More than 20 years ago, in a world where hard work and commitment define us, Gladiator Shoes emerged over two decades ago with a single mission: to redefine safety footwear.

We are one of the top suppliers of Safety Shoes in Qatar and UAE.

Gladiator Shoes is a reputable and well-known company that makes durable, comfortable shoes that can survive even the most demanding work settings. Explore our range of Metal Free Safety Shoes designed to provide the highest protection without compromising comfort.

See Collection

Most Loved Products

A Legacy of Excellence in Safety Footwear,  Born from Moonway Trading L.L.C., Gladiator Shoes was established with a vision to make safe footwear that prioritizes both protection and comfort. Our commitment to quality has cultivated a devoted clientele in a variety of industries over the years. Gladiator’s journey started with a straightforward but revolutionary idea: creating safety shoes that let people operate in dangerous settings without sacrificing comfort.

Clientele

A Trustworthy Choice for Safety Footwear

For almost twenty years, Gladiator Shoes has been the go-to option for professionals across a range of industries. We’ve carefully designed our
Safety Shoes in Qatar and UAE to provide protection in some of the most dangerous situations. 

  • Rigorous Testing Standards
  • Attention to Detail
  • Customer-Centric Design Philosophy
  • Style with Substance

Purchasing Gladiator Shoes is more than just selecting shoes; it’s selecting a company that prioritises quality, safety, and innovation.
Gladiator Shoes recognises the need for comfort, particularly for people who stand for extended periods of time.
 Our designs are long-lasting because we use materials that are of the highest calibre. All Gladiator shoe styles, including our durable Tactical Boots and Composite Shoes, are designed to be both comfortable and protective so you can focus on the task at hand.
 

Unmatched Comfort & Durability

Safety footwear has traditionally been synonymous with heavy, uncomfortable designs, often becoming a burden for the wearer. Gladiator Shoes has transformed this idea with its creative, lightweight, and breathable Composite Shoes. Our composite safety shoes are made of premium materials like carbon fibre and Kevlar, which offer durability and stop excessive weight from metal components. Particularly in places like airports or power plants where metal-free footwear is required for security reasons, these Metal Free Safety Shoes offer enough protection and improve comfort, making them perfect for extended usage.

Safety, Comfort & Style

When you choose Gladiator Shoes, you are investing in long-lasting footwear. Gladiator Shoes offers a variety of options to suit your needs, including lightweight metal free safety shoes for a job that is sensitive to metal, durable Leather Boots for construction work, and uniform shoes for a professional setting. When you choose Gladiator Shoes, you’re investing in quality, safety, and a company committed to creating a safer workplace more than simply a pair of shoes.
